message:
Merge PR #2549: research: macOS sandbox-exec capabilities and limitations

Comprehensive research doc covering sandbox-exec viability for polecat isolation
on macOS. Includes SBPL syntax reference, Node.js compatibility profile, and
local test results confirming filesystem, network, and process restrictions work.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2549
Author: michaellady
